name: Hum Warm-Up
pedagogy: A gentle closed-mouth hum on a 1-3-5-3-1 arpeggio. The semi-occlusion of the lips builds steady back-pressure that eases the folds into vibration with minimal effort — a low-impact way to wake the voice and bridge registers before fuller exercises. (Titze SOVT.) Plays as a follow-along: hum along with the piano, no scoring.
